articles.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
articles.description: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
articles.description: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial
articles.author: Connie Loizos
